title: Ruffulon Straight Edge Paring Knife Set of 6, Stainless Steel Small Kitchen Knife, Ultra Sharp Peeling Knife, Fruit Knife with Black Plastic Handle,Rust Prevention
features: Multi-functional：Ruffulon Classic Practical Black Paring knife set (blade length 8.5 cm, total length 19 cm. Weight: 0.41 lb/handle), the sharp blade can easily shred, slice, dice, cut meat, etc., making most kitchen preparation tasks hassle-free.

For fine work: This knife is perfect for preparing all types of fruits and vegetables and is suitable for peeling, cored and seeded fruits and vegetables. It is especially suitable for the fine processing of apple, onion, small mushroom and pepper.

Stainless steel blade: The cutting surface is specially constructed, using high-quality stainless steel material, sharp and durable, not easy to rust, cutting without adhesion, to ensure the best cutting performance and durability.

Exquisite design: The black shank features a sturdy, hygienic, matte PP handle with an ergonomic design that fits well into the palm for non-slip and safe and comfortable cutting. An elegant black paring knife is an essential kitchen knife.
Note: In order to maintain the service life of the tool and ensure the perfection of each cut, after cleaning and dry storage, can be washed in the dishwasher to save time and effort.
description: Product Description Ruffulon Straight Blade Paring Knife (Black) Product details Multifunctional knife Suitable fruit With a sharp blade can also easily peel the fruit, peeling is not easy to break; Can also be used to remove peach, cherry and other fruit pit. Suitable meat Use a knife to cut sausage, soft meat, etc. With this knife, you have the perfect tool for precise cutting. Suitable vegetable Use a knife to peel Onions, potatoes, etc. With our knives you can easily handle the delicate work in the kitchen. Dishwasher safety In order to maintain the sharpness of the tool and extend the service life: it is recommended to wash it by hand with mild soap and dry it with a soft cloth after cleaning. Do not store in damp place for long time. The Ruffulon multi-functional paring knife is a great tool for your kitchen tasks, whether rough or delicate. This sharp knife can be used to cut all kinds of food and is the best kitchen helper. Its excellent cutting ability will never let you down.
